relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains pre-approved credit offer data (marketing → credit), while the outbound file contains arrears status data (credit → customer_services). These represent fundamentally different business processes: offer generation vs. payment delinquency tracking. Only customer_id and account_number overlap as identifiers, but the outbound file's core payload (arrears amounts, payment dates, delinquency status) has no corresponding source fields in the inbound schema, which focuses on offer terms and eligibility criteria rather than account performance or payment history.
